svg.text: Dust Collector Blast Gate Controller — Wiring Diagram (Wiegand 26-bit | 20 ft runs | 4 Gates)
Wiegand readers require 12V — verify your specific reader before wiring
DATA0 / DATA1 are open-drain; most readers include internal pull-ups (check datasheet)
Use 22 AWG 6-conductor shielded security cable for reader runs (up to 20 ft)
Use 20 AWG 3-conductor shielded cable for servo runs — heavier gauge prevents voltage drop
Ground cable shields at the Arduino/enclosure end only — prevents ground loops
Route reader cables and servo cables separately — servo PWM creates RF noise
